title: Tim Crawley Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Tim Crawley Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Tim Crawley
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’24
Silicon Valley Campus
As a Division I college football player, Tim Crawley’s schedule was packed. His athletic commitments made it impossible to prioritize his favorite classes, and he left with a bachelor’s degree in a field he wasn’t passionate about. Then, as an Align student, he pursued his passion for computer science, and soon began seeing his desired career take shape.
The students here, everybody who I’ve met so far has been great. It’s a strong sense of camaraderie here. It’s cool to see where everybody started out, what everybody pursued before this, and it’s kinda cool to see where we can go
Tim Crawley, MSCS ’24
Explore all Khoury Stories
